name: @acronis-platform/tokens-pd
description: Acronis platform (PD) design tokens: per-brand CSS custom properties, per-component CSS, Tailwind presets, and a DTCG intermediate — generated from @acronis-platform/design-tokens via @acronis-platform/style-dictionary.

scripts.dev: echo "no dev (generated artifacts; run build)" && exit 0
scripts.clean: echo "no clean (generated artifacts are committed; run build to regenerate)" && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo "no lint (generated artifacts; source is @acronis-platform/design-tokens)" && exit 0
scripts.typecheck: echo "no typecheck (generated artifacts; no TypeScript sources)" && exit 0
